name: Siamese
description: Talkative sidekicks that trail their humans, crave puzzle toys, and adore tall perches with sunny views.

name: Maine Coon
description: Pillow-soft fluffers who prefer chill play, learn leash walks quickly, and enjoy greeting guests at the door.

image.alt: Maine Coon cat lounging on a sofa

name: British Shorthair
description: Plush, quiet buddies who appreciate structured routines, chunky scratching posts, and evening couch marathons.

image.alt: British Shorthair cat sitting by a window

name: Bengal
description: Endless explorers that need vertical playgrounds, clicker training, and rotating hunt-style games.

name: Ragdoll
description: Down-for-any-snuggle cats who flop into arms, follow kids gently, and do best with soft brushing rituals.

name: Sphynx
description: Affection-first cuddlers who love sweaters, weekly spa baths, and heated beds to stay cozy between zoomies.
